title: Autoresearch: research-pipeline (Mai 2026)
description:
Monthly autoresearch loop for **research-pipeline**.

Weekly research pipeline (email scan, RSS, clean, label, briefing). Improve article labeling precision, scan coverage, and digest quality.

**Target path:** `/root/.openclaw/workspace/projects/digital-research/data`
**Focus areas:** labeling precision, scan coverage, digest relevance

Run /autoresearch (agent-growth-suite) against this target.
Measure before/after. Keep only improvements that score better.
Commit results and document in AUTORESEARCH-LOG.md.
